onRefresh.description: Called when the user releases past the threshold. Return a Promise to keep the spinner visible until the work completes.

threshold.description: Distance in pixels the user must pull before a refresh is triggered.

maxPull.description: Maximum visual pull distance (after drag resistance).

variant.description: Indicator style. 'spinner' rotates with pull progress, 'arrow' flips on threshold, 'dots' shows three bouncing dots, 'minimal' shows a plain bar.

refreshingText.description: Indicator label shown while the promise is pending.

pullingText.description: Indicator label shown while pulling but before threshold.

releaseText.description: Indicator label shown once the threshold is reached.

className.description: Additional CSS class for the wrapper.

scrollContainer.description: External scroll container to observe instead of the wrapper. Useful when the scrollable element lives below this wrapper.
